rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.036 governs officeholder campaign contributions. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: An officeholder who lawfully accepts officeholder contributions may use those contributions in connection with the officeholder's campaign for elective office after appointing a campaign treasurer.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no overlap in subject matter.
